drifts.truth: default page size = 20 (PRD R4; ARCHITECTURE config table + GET /tasks params; README listing; IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN Phase 3; CONTEXT)

drifts.injected: the completion-webhook call (and its import) were removed from PATCH; src/services/webhook.ts is now orphaned/never called
drifts.truth: R7: transition into 'done' MUST fire the task-completion webhook (PRD R7; ARCHITECTURE webhook flow; README webhook section; IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN Phase 4; CONTEXT). The code no longer implements it.

drifts.truth: task status enum = todo | in_progress | done (PRD R6; src/types.ts TaskStatus; src/schema.sql tasks.status ENUM). The route now rejects the valid 'in_progress' status.
drifts.detect: tasks.ts STATUSES is missing 'in_progress', which the schema, types, and PRD all include

drifts.injected: GET /tasks returns { items: [...], page, page_size, total }

drifts.detect: code returns an 'items' key but every doc specifies a 'data' key for the list envelope

drifts.injected: Rate limit max = 250 requests / window / IP

drifts.injected: claims Phase 2 shipped a 'token refresh endpoint'
drifts.truth: there is no refresh endpoint: src/routes/auth.ts exposes only POST /auth/register and POST /auth/login; PRD R2 explicitly marks refresh out of v1 endpoint scope; CONTEXT's own 'What's next' still lists POST /auth/refresh as a future candidate (internal contradiction)
drifts.detect: CONTEXT claims a shipped token-refresh endpoint that does not exist in the code (and contradicts its own roadmap)

drifts.class: arch-vs-plan (plan claims component absent from arch/code)
drifts.injected: adds a deliverable: 'Task list responses are cached in Redis with a 60s TTL (cache-aside)'
drifts.truth: there is no Redis / caching anywhere — ARCHITECTURE stack is Express + MySQL only, no cache layer in src/, and package.json has no redis dependency
drifts.detect: the plan introduces a Redis caching deliverable that the architecture and code never realize

drifts.truth: access-token TTL = 15 minutes / '15m' (PRD R2; ARCHITECTURE; src/config.ts accessTokenTtl; IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN Phase 2; CONTEXT)

drifts.truth: the column is 'description' (ARCHITECTURE data model tasks table; src/types.ts Task.description; src/routes/tasks.ts INSERT/SELECT use description)

drifts.truth: GET /health returns { status: 'ok' } (PRD R9; ARCHITECTURE API surface; README; IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN Phase 4; CONTEXT)
